title: [architect] Implement Codex/Claude agent-surface parity checks
objective: Build: Implement or prototype the missing Codex parity surface: `meta init codex`, `meta sync codex-skills --check/--write`, and `meta parity check agent-surfaces --json`, using canonical meta skill/prompt sources and preserving operator-local secrets/config.
acceptance_criteria: `meta init codex` or a documented prototype creates the expected `.codex` prompts/rules/agents/hooks including a PR-repair front door.
`meta sync codex-skills --check` fails on drift and `--write` refreshes managed generated surfaces without overwriting local secrets.
`meta parity check agent-surfaces --json` reports canonical skills, Claude projection, Codex projection, plugin/MCP availability, and CLI fallback status.
Claude and Codex PR-repair front doors are generated or checked from the same semantic source; no independent prompt drift remains undocumented.
